name: always-on-content-growth-engine
description: Turn proven social content into evidence-backed Tencent Cloud content opportunities, platform copy, brand-safe visuals, review packets, and Notion-ready records.

interface.shortDescription: Find proven social patterns and turn them into reviewable Tencent Cloud content.
interface.longDescription: A human-reviewed content production system for discovering high-performing social posts, normalizing performance against account baselines, translating reusable patterns into Tencent Cloud customer education, drafting public English copy, generating VI-compatible visual material, composing LinkedIn carousels, and writing evidence-backed opportunities into Notion.
defaultPrompt: Find two proven social content opportunities for Tencent Cloud.
Turn this source post into a reviewable multi-platform content package.
Create a concise LinkedIn carousel using Tencent Cloud visual material.
